---
title: "Projects"
css: styles/projects.css
---

::: project-card
::: project-header
::: project-title-block
### Interactive F1 Qualifying Analysis
[St. Lawrence University · 2024–2025]{.project-meta}
:::
::: project-tags
[R]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag} [Data Viz]{.tag}
:::
:::

Built an interactive Shiny application for exploring F1 telemetry and qualifying data across the 2018–2024 seasons. Users can compare two drivers head-to-head within a race or track a single driver's performance over time through customizable, publication-quality visualizations.

[{{< fa brands github >}} f1-animate](https://github.com/norah-kuduk/f1-animate){.project-link}
:::

::: project-card
::: project-header
::: project-title-block
### AI-Augmented Physical Therapy App
[Cross-platform · Flutter & Dart]{.project-meta}
:::
::: project-tags
[Flutter]{.tag} [PostgreSQL]{.tag} [Docker]{.tag}
:::
:::

Developed a cross-platform app for athletes and individuals managing chronic injuries, featuring scheduling, calendar views, and a customizable exercise library. Designed a relational data model for exercises, routines, and user progress, backed by a PostgreSQL database in Docker. Leveraged AI-assisted development workflows (ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot) throughout the build.
:::
